response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially utilized the provided lyrics reference and manually transcribed the remaining segments.
2. JSON Usage: Mapped 'Ai no Scenario', 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!', and 'Legend-Changer' based on visual title cards and vocal performances.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles precisely to vocal delivery, prioritizing vocal-anchored synchronization with zero lag. Added a silent visual text translation for the title card of 'Legend-Changer' during the instrumental intro.

subtitles.original: たとえ世界を敵に回したとしても
subtitles.english: Even if I make the world my enemy,

subtitles.original: 「信じて」差し出す掌
subtitles.english: "Believe in me," the palm I reach out,

subtitles.original: 決して離さない 答えは届いた
subtitles.english: I'll never let go, the answer has arrived,

subtitles.original: 結んだ運命 この手の中
subtitles.english: The tied destiny is in my hands.

subtitles.original: 繰り返された 後悔だとしても
subtitles.english: Even if it is a repeated regret,

subtitles.original: 決して逃げない 怖くはないから
subtitles.english: I'll never run, because I'm not afraid,

subtitles.original: 抗うんだ
subtitles.english: I will resist.

subtitles.original: 何度も 何度も
subtitles.english: Again and again,

subtitles.original: 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: I will keep on running.

subtitles.original: Wake up! 闘志新生
subtitles.english: Wake up! A newborn fighting spirit,

subtitles.original: Shift up! ギア回して
subtitles.english: Shift up! Shift the gears,

subtitles.original: Speed up! 限界叩いて
subtitles.english: Speed up! Pushing the limits,

subtitles.original: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!
subtitles.english: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!

subtitles.original: Jump up! 天辺へ
subtitles.english: Jump up! To the top,

subtitles.original: Turn up! 声合わせて
subtitles.english: Turn up! Raise our voices together,

subtitles.original: Dream on! 未来繋いで
subtitles.english: Dream on! Connect the future,

subtitles.original: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!
subtitles.english: U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!

subtitles.original: 最高潮コンディション 闘志ガンガン尖らせていこう
subtitles.english: In peak condition, let's fire up our fighting spirit!

subtitles.original: 栄光のチャンピオン 虎視眈々と狙っていこう
subtitles.english: Glancing at the glorious champion, let's keep a vigilant eye!

subtitles.original: ハイペースよりマイペース 気合レースに猛集中
subtitles.english: My pace over high pace, focus intensely on the spirited race!

subtitles.original: 駆けるシグナルは限界 ハートに火をつけ U.M.A. Let's go!
subtitles.english: The running signal is at its limit, ignite the heart, U.M.A. Let's go!

subtitles.original: 最高潮アンビション ぶつかり合ってガチ勝負 絶好のチャンスを 全力出して掴んでいこう
subtitles.english: Clashing in a serious showdown with peak ambition, let's give it all to seize this perfect chance!

subtitles.original: ハイペースよりマイペース 気合レースに猛集中
subtitles.english: My pace over high pace, focus intensely on the spirited race!

subtitles.original: 掛けるウォームアップはセット完了 勝ち上がっていこう
subtitles.english: Warm-up is all set, let's rise to the top and win!

subtitles.original: 友と二人 競い合った 風の中でも
subtitles.english: Competing together, even through the wind,

subtitles.original: 大きな背中追いかけてた 雨の中でも
subtitles.english: Chasing after that big back, even through the rain,

subtitles.original: 何百何千回と 積み重ねてきた
subtitles.english: Hundreds and thousands of times we've accumulated,

subtitles.original: だからどこまでも遠く どこまでも高く 誰よりも早く 誰よりも強く
subtitles.english: So farther than anyone, higher than anyone, faster than anyone, stronger than anyone!

subtitles.original: さあ 今
subtitles.english: Now, at this moment,

subtitles.original: 駆け出した思いはもう止まらない
subtitles.english: these running feelings can no longer be stopped!

subtitles.original: 誰にも渡せないゴールまで
subtitles.english: Until the goal that I won't hand over to anyone,

subtitles.original: 弱気な気持ち蹴飛ばして 強く戦う ずっと
subtitles.english: kick away the timid feelings, I'll fight strongly forever!

subtitles.original: 立ち上がって 走り抜け
subtitles.english: Stand up and run through!

subtitles.original: 鳴り出した鼓動はもう収まらない
subtitles.english: The heartbeat that started to ring will not settle down!

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力疾走 レースを駆けて
subtitles.english: Sprinting with full power until the end, running through the race,

subtitles.original: 頂点へと手を伸ばして 限界さえ超えてゆけ
subtitles.english: reach out to the top and go beyond even the limits!

subtitles.original: 伝説を追い越して 勝利へ
subtitles.english: Overtake the legend and go towards victory!

subtitles.original: 友と二人 競い合った あの喜びも
subtitles.english: The joy of competing with you,

subtitles.original: 大きな背中追いかけてた あの憧れも
subtitles.english: and that admiration as I chased your big back,

subtitles.original: 何千万回生まれ変わっても 何度でも 何度でも
subtitles.english: no matter how many millions of times I am reborn, again and again,

subtitles.original: 走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep on running.

subtitles.original: 駆け出した思いはもう止まらない
subtitles.english: This running feelings can no longer be stopped!

subtitles.original: 誰もが夢に見た未来まで
subtitles.english: Until the future everyone dreamed of,

subtitles.original: 弱気な気持ち蹴飛ばして 想い抱いてずっと
subtitles.english: kick away the timid feelings, holding my feelings forever,

subtitles.original: すべてを繋いでゆけ
subtitles.english: connect everything together!

subtitles.original: Legend-Changer (Game Size)
subtitles.english: [Title: Legend-Changer (Game Size)]

subtitles.original: 呼び覚ませ 本能を 起こせ 感動を
subtitles.english: Awaken your instinct, create an emotion,

subtitles.original: 突き進め 頂上へと 叫べ ブレイブ・ハート
subtitles.english: push forward to the top, scream "Brave Heart"!

subtitles.original: Woah-oh-oh-oh
subtitles.english: Woah-oh-oh-oh,

subtitles.original: Brave, Brave, Brave out!
subtitles.english: Brave, Brave, Brave out!

subtitles.english: Woah-oh-oh-oh,

subtitles.original: Brave, Brave, Brave out!
subtitles.english: Brave, Brave, Brave out!

subtitles.original: 歯が立たなくて 悔しいのかな
subtitles.english: Is it frustrating because you can't stand a chance?

subtitles.original: 錆び付いていた 身体はどうした
subtitles.english: What happened to your rusted gear?

subtitles.original: 運命の扉 開いたんだ
subtitles.english: The gate of destiny has opened,

subtitles.original: 目を離すな 歴史を塗り替えてやるさ
subtitles.english: don't look away, we'll rewrite history!

subtitles.original: 段 段 段 段 上がってゆく
subtitles.english: Going up step by step,

subtitles.original: 歓声 巻き起こす 時
subtitles.english: the moment cheers break out,

subtitles.original: 段 段 段 段 迫ってくる
subtitles.english: closing in step by step,

subtitles.original: あと少し 攻め合う シンパシー
subtitles.english: just a little more, clashing sympathy.

subtitles.original: 挑みたい
subtitles.english: I want to challenge,

subtitles.original: 掴みたい
subtitles.english: I want to seize it!
